label: FAIL
rationale: The target GetACL asks for SPInfo/Set and returns SUCCESS with ACE_Anybody, but the provided AccessControl preconfiguration lists SPInfo (00 00 00 02 00 00 00 01) with MethodID Get, not Set. Core says GetACL fails when the InvokingID/MethodID combination does not exist, so this SUCCESS response is not compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target GetACL asks for 0000000200000001/Set and returns SUCCESS with ACE_Anybody, but the provided AccessControl preconfiguration lists that SPInfo UID only with MethodID Get, not Set. Core says GetACL fails when the InvokingID/MethodID combination does not exist, so this SUCCESS response is not compliant.
